post.description:
Start an autonomous launch conversation for an agent.

Creates a conversation for goal clarification. The agent does NOT
start autonomous execution until approve-launch is called.

schema.title: Response Get Permissions Api V1 Agents  Agent Id  Permissions Get
Response List Pending Api V1 Approval Queue Get
Response Batch Resolve Api V1 Approval Queue Batch Resolve Post

post.description: Approve an autonomous launch — transitions from clarification to execution.

get.description: Return the current task list for an autonomous run.

patch.description: User can modify the task list mid-run.

post.description: Pause a running autonomous task at the next turn boundary.

post.description:
Send a steering message to a running background task.

The message is queued and picked up at the next turn boundary.

get.description:
Multiplexed SSE endpoint — streams all events to the frontend.

Supports reconnection via the Last-Event-ID header: on reconnect the
client receives any events it missed from the in-memory replay buffer.

schema.title: Response List Documents Api V1 Documents Get

post.description:
Send a message to Odin. Returns the stored user message (201).

The Odin response streams via SSE through the event bus.
